docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE GROUP WELFARE FUND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY PARKING COMPANY $495.47 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
